members.label: cabinet
members.description: small wooden end cabinet/side table next to recliner
members.long_form_open_description: A dark wood end cabinet or side table positioned to the right of the recliner and adjacent to the fireplace. It holds small items and possibly decorative pieces; has a paneled face and stands on the carpet.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly beside the recliner and below the window, near the fireplace
